headline: Chip rout splits the tape — NDX in negative gamma with Netflix binary tonight; SPX cushioned above 7,502 flip; RUT/DJX rotation intact.
Inflation relief + ASML AI beat drive equities higher, but negative NDX gamma and live Iran/Hormuz strikes keep overnight tail risk elevated into Thursday’s NFLX print.
CPI beats big, semis rebound — but oil, IBM, and ASML overnight keep Wednesday’s gap wide open.

Tuesday 8:30 AM ET is the most concentrated single overnight risk moment of the year: CPI, five mega-bank earnings, and Fed Chair Warsh all land within 90 minutes — reduce size and know your levels before the open.
Five mega-bank earnings and a June CPI print on Tuesday make this one of the most catalyst-loaded weekends of Q3 — NDX carries the widest implied gap band at ±1.03%.
